title: Hormuz Closure Sets Clock Ticking for Asia’s Rice Farmers
summary: The war in Iran is threatening Asia’s rice harvest. Today on the Big Take Asia: What this means for the region’s tables, economies and politics.

title: Kyle Kuzma: I'm Bullish on the NBA's Future
summary: NBA Champion & Entrepreneur Kyle Kuzma discusses joining Sierra Racing Club as team co-owner, E1 racing, and why he's bullish on the NBA's future. He talks with Romaine Bostick for "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Commerzbank CEO at Odds With Unicredit Over Valuation
summary: Commerzbank CEO Bettina Orlopp says that she has had some talks with UniCredit SpA about a deal after the Italian bank announced a takeover bid for the German lender. She speaks with Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

Lagarde Says Europe’s Economy Has Slipped Below ECB Baseline
summary: President Christine Lagarde said higher energy costs have pushed the euro zone away from the European Central Bank’s base-case outlook, though not enough yet to warrant leaning toward raising interest rates.

title: Nemetschek to Buy Thoma Bravo’s HCSS in €2 Billion-Plus Deal
summary: Nemetschek SE agreed to acquire construction management software provider Heavy Construction Systems Specialists from Thoma Bravo.
